steps.title: Use vertex form
steps.content:
The maximum height is $31.36$ feet at $t=1.4$, so the vertex is $(1.4,31.36)$. A quadratic with this vertex has form
$$f(t)=a(t-1.4)^2+31.36$$

steps.title: Choose the model
steps.content:
Substitute $a=-16$ into the vertex form:
$$f(t)=-16(t-1.4)^2+31.36$$
The answer is A.
